mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.device_id AS deviceId, d.serial_number AS serialNumber, l.action_type AS actionType, l.from_warehouse_id AS fromWarehouseId, fw.warehouse_name AS fromWarehouseName, l.to_warehouse_id AS toWarehouseId, tw.warehouse_name AS toWarehouseName, l.from_project_id AS fromProjectId, fp.project_name AS fromProjectName, l.to_project_id AS toProjectId, tp.project_name AS toProjectName, l.operator_id AS operatorId, l.quantity, l.remark, l.create_time AS createTime FROM device_inventory_log l LEFT JOIN device_instance d ON d.id = l.device_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse fw ON fw.id = l.from_warehouse_id AND fw.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse tw ON tw.id = l.to_warehouse_id AND tw.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project fp ON fp.id = l.from_project_id AND fp.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project tp ON tp.id = l.to_project_id AND tp.deleted = 0 WHERE l.deleted = 0 AND l.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC

SELECT l.id, l.device_id AS deviceId, d.serial_number AS serialNumber, l.action_type AS actionType, l.from_warehouse_id AS fromWarehouseId, fw.warehouse_name AS fromWarehouseName, l.to_warehouse_id AS toWarehouseId, tw.warehouse_name AS toWarehouseName, l.from_project_id AS fromProjectId, fp.project_name AS fromProjectName, l.to_project_id AS toProjectId, tp.project_name AS toProjectName, l.operator_id AS operatorId, l.quantity, l.remark, l.create_time AS createTime FROM device_inventory_log l LEFT JOIN device_instance d ON d.id = l.device_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse fw ON fw.id = l.from_warehouse_id AND fw.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse tw ON tw.id = l.to_warehouse_id AND tw.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project fp ON fp.id = l.from_project_id AND fp.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project tp ON tp.id = l.to_project_id AND tp.deleted = 0
l.deleted = 0
AND (l.from_warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} OR l.to_warehouse_id = #{warehouseId})
AND (l.from_project_id = #{projectId} OR l.to_project_id = #{projectId})
AND l.action_type = #{actionType}
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC
